working_on: Cadence-fired health-check audit (formal first exercise of ADR 0057 adversarial-stance posture; ~10 sessions overdue) + cadence raise 10→20 per user direction at boot. Cadence change lands first (register_state.json + ADR 0022 Consequences amendment + health-check.md cadence-policy prose), then health_check.py runs against the new cadence value, then audit prose authored at production quality per ADR 0057's five contract elements (freshness probes / forward-fit map / posture inversion / pushback-lesson clustering / cold-context probe) with User adjudication subsection blank, then T1-A through T1-E close on the adversarial-stance first-exercise readiness note.
outcome_summary: Cadence-fired health-check audit (formal first exercise of ADR 0057 adversarial-stance posture) + cadence raise 10→20 per user direction at boot. Cadence change landed first across three carriers (register_state.json + ADR 0022 Consequences amendment + health-check.md cadence-policy prose); audit ran second against the new cadence value. Audit hand-authored against the new ADR 0057 TEMPLATE.md shape (the script's auto-generated scaffold uses old-template — surfaced as Non-obvious finding B). All five contract elements exercised: user-buffered execution (User-adjudication blank, 8 recommendations route via tail-lines), posture inversion (Fit/Gaps/Infrastructure-without-function/Bloat with adversarial prompts + recommendation-shape dispositions), stats-as-proxy anti-pattern (5 fresh content probes — MemPalace 5-term searches, validator acted-on-rate, hooks tail surfacing new env_pointer regression, registries, Supabase deferred-to-routine), 3 affirmative retire candidates (legacy dead_weight files; 2 MemPalace-skip warns reclass; ADR 0049 unkept promise), cold-context probe (sort -R fallback for shuf; cascade-discipline.md surfaced orphan-OK list audit gap). Forward-fit map per S-0086 dual-temporal-frame lesson covers post-audit work. Pushback Cluster A surfaced (defer-hedge close-summary language; S-0071 canonical instance fired AFTER feedback_defer_indefinitely_is_pointless was written — recommendation: validator-side mechanization). First-exercise gate closes: T1-A through T1-E resolved at S-0097 with closure observations citing audit-report sections; build_readiness/README.md row flipped to Closed; ADR 0057 contract held. Validator at shutdown: 0 hard-fails; 373 soft-warns (health_check_overdue cleared on last_audit_session bump). Next cadence fire projected S-0117. MemPalace diary + decision drawer captured.
declared_scope: Land the cadence-fired health-check audit at docs/health-checks/S-0097.md against TEMPLATE.md (formal first exercise of ADR 0057 adversarial-stance posture; T1-A through T1-E close on adversarial_stance_first_exercise.md). Raise health-check cadence from every 10 sessions to every 20 across the three carriers (register_state.json + ADR 0022 Consequences amendment + health-check.md cadence-policy prose). Update STATE.md / ENGINE_LOG.md / build_readiness/README.md per the standard cascade.
